description: The TouchWorldLink component when touched allows a user to go to the world of the given link.

fields.Vibrate: How to vibrate the haptics of the hand that touched this component.
fields.LastOpened: The last world time this component was pressed.
fields.WorldLink: The world link to open upon touch.

usage: Attach to a slot with a static collider, and provide a ``WorldLink`` for this to link to in order for it to work.
